g.text: Tracee Virtual Address Space (separate page table)
Byte Scan — Word 2 (null found at i=3)
byte_offset | addr - aligned | 0 (start at byte 0 of word)
Rule: always read word-aligned | then skip leading bytes
Case A: w==-1 AND errno!=0 | REAL ERROR | addr unmapped / EFAULT
Case B: w==-1 AND errno==0 | VALID DATA | 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF in mem
MUST: errno=0 before call | THEN check | errno after call
Never: if(w==-1) break | WRONG — misses valid 0xFF...FF data
alignment + errno rules apply to every call
